deep_dive.title: ScanFocus: A Coarse-to-Fine Framework for Spatio-Temporal Video Grounding
deep_dive.abstract: Spatio-Temporal Video Grounding (STVG) aims to retrieve the visual trajectory of a specific object from a video stream as described by a natural language expression. However, most advanced methods struggle to balance global context modeling with precise boundary localization. Due to the prohibitive computational costs of processing long videos, these approaches typically resort to low-rate temporal downsampling and implicit motion modeling. This inevitably suppresses high-frequency boundary cues and neglects the explicit inter-frame dependencies required for precise boundary delineation. To address these limitations, we present \textbf{ScanFocus}, a novel coarse-to-fine framework that decouples the STVG task into a global spatio-temporal scan and a local boundary focus. Specifically, we utilize a unified vision-language fusion encoder combined with a lightweight Deformable Semantic-Motion Fusion module to efficiently align multimodal features and generate coarse proposals. To recover the suppressed fine-grained details, we introduce the Semantic-Guided Temporal Aggregator (SGTA) in the refinement stage. By densely sampling around coarse boundaries, SGTA explicitly models short-term temporal interactions under semantic guidance, capturing rapid motion changes for precise timestamp regression. Extensive experiments on three widely used benchmarks demonstrate the performance superiority of our proposed method over previous approaches. Code will be released at https://github.com/TenMinutes209/ScanFocus.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: Spatio-temporal video grounding retrieves object trajectory via natural language description
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 根据自然语言描述检索物体轨迹
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 根据自然语言描述检索物体轨迹
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 根据自然语言描述检索物体轨迹
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: ScanFocus proposes a coarse-to-fine framework for spatio-temporal video grounding that decouples global scan from fine localization, achieving efficient and accurate language-guided object tracking.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 现有时空视频定位方法在长视频处理中因欠采样丢失高频边界线索，难以兼顾全局上下文与精确边界定位。本文提出ScanFocus粗到细框架，将任务解耦为全局时空扫描和精细定位，显式建模帧间依赖，在保持计算效率的同时提升边界定位精度。在多个基准数据集上，ScanFocus取得了最先进的性能，为语言引导的视觉跟踪提供了高效解决方案。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 现有时空视频定位方法在长视频处理中因欠采样丢失高频边界线索，难以兼顾全局上下文与精确边界定位。本文提出ScanFocus粗到细框架，将任务解耦为全局时空扫描和精细定位，显式建模帧间依赖，在保持计算效率的同时提升边界定位精度。在多个基准数据集上，ScanFocus取得了最先进的性能，为语言引导的视觉跟踪提供了高效解决方案。

quick_skim.title: DynTrace: Tracking Dynamic Object Evidence for 4D Spatio-Temporal Reasoning in MLLMs
quick_skim.abstract: 4D spatio-temporal reasoning, jointly modeling 3D spatial structure and temporal evolution, is essential for understanding dynamic worlds and enabling embodied interaction. While current Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) show strong capabilities in static scene understanding and coarse-grained 4D tasks, they still have notable limitations in continuous dynamic scene perception, especially in tracking dynamic object evidence for coherent 4D spatio-temporal reasoning. This shortcoming stems mainly from relying on sparse frame-level observations, fragmenting continuous dynamic cues and leaving models unable to disentangle genuine object dynamics from camera-induced apparent motion. Inspired by humans tracking dynamic cues while compensating for viewpoint changes, we propose DynTrace, a training-free framework for 4D spatio-temporal reasoning with two complementary components. Dynamic Trajectory Visualization (DTV) reprojects world-coordinate trajectories onto the image plane, providing geometry-informed visual priors that disentangle genuine object dynamics from camera-induced apparent motion. Meanwhile, the Dynamic Trace Token (DT-Token), organized into a Dynamic Trace Graph (DTG), tracks object-level dynamic cues, trace evolution, and key moments, maintaining continuous dynamic object evidence for coherent 4D reasoning. Together, these two components equip MLLMs with continuously tracked dynamic object evidence, grounded in geometry-informed visual priors and structured spatio-temporal traces. DynTrace consistently improves open-source MLLMs, achieving state-of-the-art results on Dyn-Bench, VLM4D, and DSI-Bench, validating the importance of tracking dynamic object evidence for robust 4D spatio-temporal reasoning.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: tracking dynamic object evidence using MLLMs
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 使用多模态大语言模型跟踪动态物体证据
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 使用多模态大语言模型跟踪动态物体证据
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 使用多模态大语言模型跟踪动态物体证据
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: DynTrace enhances MLLMs for 4D spatio-temporal reasoning by tracking dynamic object evidence to disentangle genuine object motion from camera motion.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对多模态大语言模型在连续动态场景感知中难以跟踪物体动态证据的问题，本文提出DynTrace，通过追踪动态物体证据来区分真实物体运动与相机运动。该方法在4D时空推理任务上提升了性能，使MLLMs能更好地理解动态世界，为具身智能体与环境的交互提供了更连贯的时空感知能力。
